title: Game Streamer
author: bstrana
description: Baseball game live display overlay manager for OBS streaming. Manage matches and generate transparent scoreboard overlays powered by WBSC live data.
tagline: Baseball scoreboard overlay for OBS streaming

APP_BASE_URL.description: Public URL of this app (used for overlay link generation)

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Google OAuth 2.0 client ID for YouTube scheduling (optional)

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Google OAuth 2.0 client secret for YouTube scheduling (optional)

changelog: YouTube live stream scheduling: connect Google account, schedule broadcasts from match cards, broadcast URL stored per match.
